competitors.name: Garden: Stay in Touch
competitors.strength: Extremely simple and focused design, free app, direct integration with address book and Facebook Messenger. Users love the straightforward approach without unnecessary features.
competitors.weakness: Very limited integrations (no WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Voice), no interaction history timeline, cannot add notes to individual interactions, missing photo management for manual contacts.

competitors.name: Linc - Friendship Tracker
competitors.strength: Comprehensive relationship insights with engagement statistics, iCloud sync across devices, Siri/Shortcuts integration, private notes system, tracks birthdays and important dates. Well-suited for introverts managing guilt about maintaining relationships.
competitors.weakness: Expensive lifetime pricing ($69.99), lacks bulk management features, cannot rename preset categories, no keyword search, UI less polished than competitors, no automatic sync with call/message history due to privacy limitations.

competitors.name: Catchup
competitors.strength: Newly launched (2023), emphasizes genuine personal check-ins over passive social media engagement. Simple reminder system for staying in touch with selected friends and family.
competitors.weakness: Limited feature details available, appears to be basic functionality only, newer app with less proven track record.

competitors.name: 카카오톡/문자 수동 관리
competitors.strength: 무료, 이미 사용 중인 익숙한 플랫폼, 별도 앱 설치 불필요.
competitors.weakness: 수동으로 기억해야 함, 알림 기능 없음, 관계 건강도나 통계 제공 안 함, 바쁘면 잊어버림.

competitors.name: Personal CRM (Dex, Clay, Cloze)
competitors.strength: Professional networking focus with LinkedIn integration, comprehensive contact management, business-grade features, relationship insights and analytics.
competitors.weakness: 비즈니스 중심이라 개인 친구 관계에는 과도하게 복잡함, 유료 구독 모델 (월 $10-30), 학습 곡선 높음, 친밀한 관계 추적에는 부적합한 UI/UX.

market_summary: 친구 관계 알림 시장은 무료/단순 앱(Garden, Catchup)과 고기능 유료 앱(Linc $70)으로 양극화. 중간 가격대에 '관계 건강도 점수' 같은 차별화 기능을 가진 제품은 부재. 수동 기록 방식은 모든 기존 앱의 공통 한계.
